steps.title: Track the full date range
steps.content: The student wants to specify how long Mozambique used the escudo officially. The relevant notes give both endpoints: Mozambique adopted the escudo in 1914, and the metical replaced it in 1980.

steps.title: Reject incomplete timing
steps.content: A gives no dates for the escudo's official use. B gives only the starting year. D focuses on the metical since 1980 and does not state when the escudo first became official. The answer is C.
